title: National Data Library
body: "This note summarises an expert roundtable held in October 2024, discussing the opportunities a National Data Library can provide and what we can learn from past initiatives, including innovations in the private sector and in start up communities  Rapid projects support government departments to understand the scientific evidence underpinning a policy issue or area by convening academic, industry and government experts at a single roundtable. These summary meeting notes seek to provide accessible science advice for policymakers. They represent the combined views of roundtable participants at the time of the discussion and are not statements of government policy. "
